calendar.matters:
Petition To Approve Settlement; Modify Trust; And Terminate Sub-Trust For Outright Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Knitter for Objector Tsar F. Mulvana; Jeff Loew for petitioners Christina Daniel, Alex Daniel, Christopher Daniel, Daniel Daniel, and Marianna Daniel.

Mr. Knitter informed the Court that under the trust instruments there would be a major distribution of trust corpus to the beneficiaries with children, and that the remaining balance in trust would be miniscule. He stated that the parties had agreed that the property would be sold under the direction of a professional fiduciary, and that the fiduciary is bonded. Mr. Knitter added that under the terms of the trust documents, a trustee was permitted to serve without bond. Mr. Loew was in agreement with Mr. Knitter. The Court granted the petition, subject to review of the order, expressing that the Court would take a further look at the need for a bond.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-13-2016 Vacated

Petition For 1. Unjunctive Relief; 2. Instructions; 3. Compel Accountings; 4. Removal Of Respondent As Trustee Of The Gertrue B. Edwards Testamentary
Off Calendar Mar-28-2016 Continued To Oct-17-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stewart J. Schwartz (via court call) for (petitioners) Christina, Alex, Christopher, Daniel & Marianna Daniel. David Knitter (via court call) for (respondent) Tsar Mulvana.

The Court asked for status on the mediation. Mr. Schwartz reported that mediation is set for April 20, 2016 before John Hartog, that they have their documents and that they are in good shape to go forward. Mr. Knitter stated that they should set a trial date for September or October in the event that the mediation is not successful. The matter was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial on October 17, 2016.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. Court Reporter: David Disbrow, CSR #7768, 415-298-1538 (Reported)

Petition For 1. Unjunctive Relief; 2. Instructions; 3. Compel Accountings; 4. Removal Of Respondent As Trustee Of The Gertrue B. Edwards Testamentary
Off Calendar Mar-07-2016 Continued To Mar-28-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For 1. Unjunctive Relief; 2. Instructions; 3. Compel Accountings; 4. Removal Of Respondent As Trustee Of The Gertrue B. Edwards Testamentary
Off Calendar Dec-28-2015 Continued To Mar-07-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stewart Schwartz for (petitioners) Christina, Alex, Christopher, Daniel & Marianna Daniel. David Knitter (via court call) for (trustee) Tsar Mulvana.

The Court asked for a status on the mediation. Mr. Schwartz reported that they are continuing with mediation, that John Hartog is the mediator, that there have been delays in conducting discovery, that information regarding documents is being sought, that they have not had an opportunity to copy documents, that they have mediation scheduled for the end of January and request a continuance to a date after February 28, 2016. Mr. Knitter stated that he is in agreement with Mr. Schwartz. The Court expressed concern regarding finding out in March that no progress has been made and asked what would help move things along, suggesting a date for an evidentiary hearing. Mr. Schwartz stated that they are moving along, that they are making progress, that they believe that the mediation will happen and that there are a lot of issues to resolve. Mr. Knitter stated that they are close to a resolution. The Court stated that if substantial progress is not made a trial date will be assigned when they return in March. The petition for injunctive relief, instructions, to compel accountings, etc., was continued to March 7, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy C. Robles. (Not Reported)

Petition For 1. Unjunctive Relief; 2. Instructions; 3. Compel Accountings; 4. Removal Of Respondent As Trustee Of The Gertrue B. Edwards Testamentary
Off Calendar Oct-05-2015 Continued To Dec-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For 1. Unjunctive Relief; 2. Instructions; 3. Compel Accountings; 4. Removal Of Respondent As Trustee Of The Gertrue B. Edwards Testamentary
Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Continued To Oct-05-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For 1. Unjunctive Relief; 2. Instructions; 3. Compel Accountings; 4. Removal Of Respondent As Trustee Of The Gertrue B. Edwards Testamentary
Off Calendar May-20-2015 Continued To Sep-21-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stewart Schwartz for (Petitioner) Christina Daniel. David Knitter for (Trustee) Tzar Mulrama.

Mr. Knitter reported that the parties are in agreement to mediate, that they would like time for the family to talk first and that they have agreed on a mediator. Mr. Schwartz stated that he feels the cost of mediation should be paid by the trust. Mr. Knitter responded that he has no authority to authorize this and that he would speak to his client. Mediation must be completed no later than September 1, 2015. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation prior to the status date. The matter was continued to and the Parties are to return on September 21, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. Mr. Schwartz stated that he has filed a supplement and that he will notice everyone regarding the new hearing date. Mr. Knitter stated that if the matters are not resolved, he will be filing a petition for instructions.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Yeung. (Not Reported)
